settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.description: Changes translated UI text where translations are available.
moves.slash.name: Slash
moves.fire_balls.name: Fire Balls
moves.blood_beam.name: Blood Beam
moves.blood_beam.desc: Sustained piercing beam that causes bleed.
moves.love_beam.name: Love Beam
moves.love_beam.desc: A radiant beam that damages enemies and heals you on hit.
moves.dash.name: Dash
weapons.extending_staff.name: Extending Staff
weapons.extending_staff.description: Long sweeping strike with massive knockback.
weapons.hunters_bow.name: Hunter's Bow
weapons.hunters_bow.description: Fast, accurate ranged shot with +10% crit chance.
weapons.thorns_bleed_blade.name: Thorn's Bleed Blade
weapons.thorns_bleed_blade.description: Close slash with heavy bleed application.
items.gold_vac.name: Gold Vac
items.gold_vac.description: Tool: runs for 2 minutes. Automatically vacuums pickups from across the room and doubles coin pickup value. Each extra stack adds +30s and +50% coin value.
items.attack_servo.name: Attack Servo
moves.smite.name: Spear of Lightning
moves.smite.desc: Lightning spear jab that chains between enemies — the same strike as the equipped spear.
moves.narwal_fight.name: Narwal Fight
moves.narwal_fight.desc: A wide pink spear-sweep with a piercing follow-up.
moves.mooggy_swipe.name: Mooggy Swipe
moves.mooggy_swipe.desc: Wide claw swipe with a small bleed chance. Hold to charge: a full wind-up unleashes a wider, far heavier slash.
moves.turtle_wave.name: Turtle Wave
moves.turtle_wave.desc: Giant beam. Drains 2 HP each active second.
moves.power_disks.name: Power Disks
moves.hammer_throw.name: Hammer Throw
moves.hammer_throw.desc: Hurl a heavy spinning hammer that flies out, then arcs back to you — striking foes both ways.
moves.blade_justice.name: Blade Justice
moves.lightning_columns.name: Lightning Columns
moves.god_sweep.name: God Sweep
moves.god_sweep.desc: Spin a massive divine beam around yourself.
moves.laser_shockwave.name: Laser Shockwave
moves.laser_shockwave.desc: Fires a shockwave that erupts rock spikes in a vertical line across the room.
moves.nail_shot.name: Nail Shot
moves.nail_shot.desc: Fires a spread of bouncing nails in all directions. 3 charges.
moves.mooggy_blood_beam.name: Blood Beam
moves.mooggy_blood_beam.desc: A crimson assassin beam that drenches enemies in heavy poison and chills them solid (freeze).
moves.thorn_blood_beams.name: Infinite Blood Beam
moves.thorn_blood_beams.desc: Four bleeding beams that orbit you, all aimed by the mouse. Channels while held.
moves.wizard_lazer.name: Wizard Lazer
moves.wizard_lazer.desc: A thick, heavy purple beam with massive recoil and heavy damage.
moves.crimson_smash.name: Crimson Smash
moves.hammer_smash.name: Hammer Smash
moves.hammer_smash.desc: Slam the war hammer down: a heavy shockwave that stuns and flings a ring of debris outward.
moves.death_ball.name: Death Ball
moves.death_ball.desc: Hold to charge, then release a big blue energy ball toward the cursor. The longer you hold, the larger it grows and the more damage it deals.
moves.turtle_powerup.name: Turtle Power-Up
moves.turtle_powerup.desc: Hold to charge a shell surge: on release, burst a small AOE at your feet, gain a barrier worth 25% of your current HP, and a temporary attack-speed & move-speed boost that grows the longer you charge.
moves.mooggy_hairball.name: Hairball Blast
moves.mooggy_hairball.desc: Hack up a venomous hairball that bursts for high poison and freezes everything caught in it.
moves.potion_bath.name: Potion Bath
moves.potion_bath.desc: Cleanse all statuses and resist them for 20s, heal 10% and regen 10% over 5s, vanish for 5s, and erupt in explosions around you.
moves.excalibur_strike.name: Summon Excalibur
moves.excalibur_strike.desc: Giant divine swords rain from the sky for huge AOE damage. 10s cooldown.
moves.holy_turrets.name: Holy Turrets
moves.holy_turrets.desc: Summon divine turrets that fire holy AOE bursts at nearby foes.
moves.kicky_kick.name: Kicky Kick
moves.kicky_kick.desc: A devastating kick with a 10% chance to launch enemies into the next room.
moves.chaos_burst.name: Chaos Burst
moves.wall_of_toph.name: Wall of Toph
moves.wall_of_toph.desc: Slam the ground: rock shards erupt all around you and a ring of temporary rock barriers rises to soak hits and break enemy lines of fire.
moves.healing_zone.name: Healing Zone
moves.healing_zone.desc: Hold to charge a healing and damage zone. Charge speed scales with attack speed.
moves.fire_circle.name: Fire Circle
moves.floor_lava.name: Floor Is Lava
moves.random_pounce.name: Random Pounce
moves.random_pounce.desc: Massive AOE explosion and homing fangs that seek enemies, dealing heavy damage with high crit chance and bleed.
moves.nimrod_stomp.name: Nimrod Stomp
moves.nimrod_stomp.desc: Leap across the room and slam on landing for heavy AOE damage.
moves.warp.name: Warp
moves.warp.desc: Phase out and reappear where the mouse is. Leaves a silhouette and grants i-frames. 4 charges.
moves.zip_lightning.name: Zip Lightning
moves.zip_lightning.desc: Zip between targets, chaining lightning hits as you move.
moves.flying_unhitable.name: Flying Untouchable
moves.flying_unhitable.desc: Rise into the air and become untouchable for 15 seconds.
moves.cowards_way.name: Coward's Way
moves.cowards_way.desc: Become invulnerable for 3 seconds, but it ends if you attack.
moves.mooggy_zoomies.name: Zoomies
moves.mooggy_zoomies.desc: 5× move speed for 12 seconds. 20 second cooldown. 2 charges.
moves.knight_slash_dash.name: Blade Filled Dash
moves.knight_slash_dash.desc: Dash through enemies and strike everything left in your wake with a high bleed rate.
weapons.claw_gauntlets.name: Claw Gauntlets
weapons.claw_gauntlets.description: Rapid wide claw swipe. High bleed chance on every hit.
weapons.lazer_glasses.name: Lazer Glasses
weapons.lazer_glasses.description: Twin beams track your mouse and can ignite enemies.
weapons.metao_fire_staff.name: Metao's Fire Staff
weapons.metao_fire_staff.description: Fan cast of burning fire bolts. 2 charges.
weapons.magenta_degale.name: Magenta's Degale
weapons.magenta_degale.description: Super heavy shot with massive knockback and recoil. 3 charges.
weapons.magenta_p90.name: Magenta's P90
weapons.magenta_p90.description: Rapid burst fire with controlled recoil. 5 charges.
weapons.gelleh_lightning_spear.name: Gelleh's Spear of Lightning
weapons.gelleh_lightning_spear.descripti: Piercing lightning spear that chains on impact.
weapons.excalibur.name: Excalibur
weapons.excalibur.description: A divine strike for 777% of your base damage.
weapons.katana_excalibur_777x.name: Katana Excalibur 777X
weapons.katana_excalibur_777x.descriptio: Blinding-fast 777% slashes that erupt in twin triangle waves left and right. 2 charges.
weapons.golden_fleece.name: Golden Fleece
weapons.golden_fleece.description: Heals 6% max HP every 2 seconds while equipped.
weapons.void_piercer.name: Void Piercer
weapons.void_piercer.description: Pierces barriers with high damage and 20% crit.
weapons.princess_wand.name: Princess's Wand
weapons.princess_wand.description: A graceful piercing magic shot made for Princess. 3 charges.
weapons.sarges_hammer.name: Sarge's Hammer
weapons.sarges_hammer.description: A heavy war hammer with a wide crushing swing. While held, 2 kills within 1 second launch a homing hammer that strikes a foe and returns to you, healing and pulling pickups on the way back.
scrolls.scroll_reroll.name: Scroll of Reroll
scrolls.scroll_reroll.description: Choose one owned relic and replace one stack with a new relic of the same rarity.
scrolls.scroll_branching.name: Scroll of Branching
scrolls.scroll_branching.description: Choose a relic. The next reward of that relic rarity becomes your chosen relic.
scrolls.scroll_replace.name: Scroll of Replace
scrolls.scroll_replace.description: Choose an unwanted relic, then choose a same-rarity replacement. Future rewards swap it.
scrolls.scroll_abundance.name: Scroll of Abundance
scrolls.scroll_abundance.description: Choose two relics. Every two floors has a chance to grant one selected relic or one random relic.
scrolls.scroll_pool_weight.name: Scroll of Pool Weight
scrolls.scroll_pool_weight.description: Choose one of 4 relics. Future rewards favor that relic for 3 floors, with rarity-scaled strength.
scrolls.scroll_ego.name: Scroll of Ego
scrolls.scroll_ego.description: For this floor, relics already in your build are 10% more common.
challenges.no_hit.name: Never Get Hit
challenges.no_hit.description: Any real damage kills the run immediately.
challenges.no_items.name: No Items
challenges.no_items.description: Start with no relic. Item pickups and relic buys are disabled.
challenges.fragile_body.name: Fragile Body
challenges.fragile_body.description: Start each run with 70% max HP.
challenges.swarm_rooms.name: Swarm Rooms
challenges.elite_hunt.name: Elite Hunt
challenges.elite_hunt.description: Elite enemies appear much more often.
challenges.cursed_shops.name: Cursed Shops
challenges.cursed_shops.description: Shop prices are 50% higher this run.
challenges.glass_cannon.name: Quartz Cannon
challenges.glass_cannon.description: Deal 25% more damage, but incoming damage is 35% higher.
challenges.cursed_blood.name: Cursed Blood
challenges.cursed_blood.description: Enemy status damage is 35% stronger, making bleed, fire, poison, and drain builds more valuable.
challenges.overcharged.name: Overcharged
challenges.overcharged.description: Kill-charge relics gain +1 extra charge progress per kill.
characters.princess.name: Princess
characters.thorn_knight.name: Thorn Knight
characters.metao.name: Metao
characters.custom_character.name: Custom

achievements.the_avatar.name: I Am the Avatar
achievements.the_avatar.desc: Apply 4+ status effects on one enemy
achievements.rival_rumble.name: Rival Rumble
achievements.gotta_meet_god.name: Gotta Meet God
achievements.gotta_meet_god.desc: Beat the game in under 5 minutes
achievements.yeshua_is_king.name: Yeshua Is King
achievements.yeshua_is_king.desc: Heal 343 (7×7×7) HP total in one run
achievements.unkillable.name: Unkillable
achievements.unkillable.desc: Beat the game without taking damage
achievements.hoarder.name: Hoarder
achievements.glass_cannon.name: Quartz Cannon
achievements.floor_muncher.name: Floor Muncher
achievements.overleveled.name: Overleveled
achievements.overleveled.desc: Reach level 20 in a single run
achievements.shopping_spree.name: Shopping Spree
achievements.shopping_spree.desc: Buy 50 items from shops in one run
achievements.loop_lord.name: Loop Lord
achievements.loop_lord.desc: Complete 3 loops in a single run
achievements.coin_goblin.name: Coin Goblin
achievements.god_slayer.name: God Slayer
achievements.extinction.name: Extinction
achievements.double_bane.name: Twice the Grave
achievements.double_bane.desc: Find and kill Bowman's Bane twice in one run
achievements.trial_master.name: Trial Master
achievements.trial_master.desc: Beat every trial challenge in one run

tutorial.welcome.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.welcome.lines.0.text: Name's Sarge. You're green, so I'm gonna make you ripe. Its time to learn how to survive on your own in the lab. Welcome to Hell Week Soldier!
tutorial.welcome.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.welcome.lines.1.text: When I talk, the world holds still, I have a ton of over clocked watches so we have all the time on earth. Read first. Move second. The bright marker always points at exactly what you need.
tutorial.welcome.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.welcome.lines.2.text: We start small: your feet and your HUD. Move out, recruit.
tutorial.training.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.training.lines.0.text: Training room. Doors with hostiles lock until the fight is done. No running from a scrap ATTACK ATTACK ATTACk.
tutorial.training.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.training.lines.1.text: Dash slips danger and gives you a blink of invulnerability. Close attack, ranged attack, heavy move — each has its own cooldown and its own job.
tutorial.training.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.training.lines.2.text: Watch for the big yellow numbers — that's a critical hit, extra damage on the house.
tutorial.training.lines.3.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.training.lines.3.text: Some weapons and moves stack nasty status — bleed, fire, poison — that keeps hurting after you stop. Layer it on.
tutorial.training.lines.4.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.training.lines.4.text: Hit that dummy with everything, put it down, then grab the relic it drops. Move!
tutorial.treasure.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.treasure.lines.0.text: Treasure room. Chests cough up coins, healing, relics — sometimes a choice between two prizes.
tutorial.treasure.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.treasure.lines.1.text: Walk into a chest to crack it. If two reward zones light up, that's a hold-to-claim: stand in the one you want until its meter fills. Risky pickups work the same way.
tutorial.treasure.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.treasure.lines.2.text: Crack this one open before you move on, recruit.
tutorial.shop.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.shop.lines.0.text: Shop. The coins you earn this run buy relics, weapons, moves, trades, and healing.
tutorial.shop.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.shop.lines.1.text: Tabs split the shelves. A green tag means it fits your build — but the call is yours, soldier.
tutorial.shop.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.shop.lines.2.text: Open up and grab the marked training relic. Spend smart every penny is life or death in the LAB.
tutorial.forge.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.forge.lines.0.text: Forge. This is where you upgrade weapons and moves for the rest of the run. Get Cracked Fast
tutorial.forge.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.forge.lines.1.text: Pick an item, press plus on a stat, choose XP or gold, then confirm. Staged changes do nothing until you confirm. Nothing.
tutorial.forge.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.forge.lines.2.text: I slipped you a Forge Voucher, so the first upgrade is on me. Use it.
tutorial.challenge.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.challenge.lines.0.text: Challenge room. Optional risk, better loot. Volunteers only — and you just volunteered.
tutorial.challenge.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.challenge.lines.1.text: Bomb trial. Blue bombs are safe: touch every blue one to defuse it. Red bombs are traps. Do NOT touch red. Clear?
tutorial.challenge.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.challenge.lines.2.text: Other trials test switch order, survival, rune-grabbing, staying still, or fighting a mirror of yourself. Stay sharp.
tutorial.challenge.lines.3.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.challenge.lines.3.text: Touch the trial marker, then defuse every blue bomb. Go.
tutorial.secret.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.secret.lines.0.text: Knew it. A secret room — this one's a vendor but you dont have a shop master yet.
tutorial.secret.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.secret.lines.1.text: Out in the dungeon these hide rare relics or warps. Always test a wall that looks too plain.
tutorial.secret.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.secret.lines.2.text: Grab what you want, then get back on mission careful.
tutorial.ladder.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.ladder.lines.0.text: Exit room. The minimap tags it EXIT. End of boot camp.
tutorial.ladder.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.ladder.lines.1.text: Out in the real dungeon, an exit might pack a final wave or a boss. This one I cleared for you.
tutorial.ladder.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.ladder.lines.2.text: Take the ladder. Floor two is the real thing — and everything you bought, grabbed, and forged comes with you.
tutorial.summary.lines.0.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.summary.lines.0.text: That's a graduation, recruit. You move, you fight, you crit, you stack status. You shop, forge, and crack chests.
tutorial.summary.lines.1.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.summary.lines.1.text: Your build, your coins, your forged upgrades, your relics — all of it rides with you to Floor Two.
tutorial.summary.lines.2.speaker: SARGE
tutorial.summary.lines.2.text: Now get down there and make the dungeon of LAB regret it. Dismissed!
cutscenes.knave_knight.lines.0.speaker: KNAVE
cutscenes.knave_knight.lines.0.text: You think you can out fight me you couldnt out argue me! your logic is false
cutscenes.knave_knight.lines.1.speaker: THORN
cutscenes.knave_knight.lines.1.text: The kingdom of God has come for you ...
cutscenes.knave_knight.lines.2.speaker: KNAVE
cutscenes.queen_metao.lines.0.speaker: QUEEN
cutscenes.queen_metao.lines.0.text: once my champion planning to kill me again are you apostate
cutscenes.queen_metao.lines.1.speaker: METAO
cutscenes.queen_metao.lines.2.speaker: QUEEN
cutscenes.rival_princess_thorn.lines.0.t: Oh, you're here. You were supposed to be fighting for me, but you took too long, so now we fight!
cutscenes.handsome_devil_thorn.lines.0.t: Hello, Thorn. I see you're well...
cutscenes.antony_blemmye.lines.0.speaker: ANTONY BLEMMYE
cutscenes.bowman_bane_thorn.lines.1.text: You cannot win this fight. The entrance is sealed. Find the hidden door and escape!
cutscenes.god_phase_1.lines.0.speaker: GOD
cutscenes.god_phase_2.lines.0.speaker: GOD
cutscenes.god_phase_3.lines.0.speaker: GOD
cutscenes.god_phase_4.lines.0.speaker: GOD
cutscenes.god_phase_5.lines.0.speaker: GOD
cutscenes.boss_openings.lines.0.speaker: QUEEN
cutscenes.boss_openings.lines.1.speaker: BULK GOLEM
cutscenes.boss_openings.lines.2.speaker: KNAVE
cutscenes.boss_openings.lines.3.speaker: BOWMAN BANE
cutscenes.boss_openings.lines.4.speaker: ANTONY BLEMMYE
cutscenes.boss_openings.lines.5.speaker: HANDSOME DEVIL
godPhaseDialogue.1: So you really want to do this ?
godPhaseDialogue.2: All the trinkets in the world can not make a mortal a god prepare for all my wrath
bossOpeningDialogue.artificer_knave: Run. I only need one clean hit.
bossOpeningDialogue.bowman_bane: You came back. I was waiting.
enemyInfo.hunter.label: Hunter
enemyInfo.hunter.desc: Relentless tracker that closes in fast and slashes. Low HP but high pressure.
enemyInfo.charger.label: Charger
enemyInfo.charger.desc: Winds up then dashes straight at the player for heavy knockback damage.
enemyInfo.laser.label: Laser Unit
enemyInfo.laser.desc: Fires a precision beam from range. Keeps distance and punishes slow movement.
enemyInfo.knave.label: Knave
enemyInfo.knave.desc: Fast melee fighter with erratic movement. Hard to read at close range.
enemyInfo.sniper.label: Sniper
enemyInfo.sniper.desc: Long-range shooter that aims carefully before firing a high-damage shot.
enemyInfo.machine_gunner.label: Machine Gunner
enemyInfo.machine_gunner.desc: Sprays bullets in rapid bursts. Low per-shot damage but overwhelming volume.
enemyInfo.golem.label: Golem
enemyInfo.golem.desc: Slow stone tank immune to bleed. High HP and damage make it dangerous up close.
enemyInfo.cult_mage.label: Cult Mage
enemyInfo.cult_mage.desc: Slow-moving caster that hurls powerful projectiles. Prioritise from a distance.
enemyInfo.cult_follower.label: Cult Follower
enemyInfo.cult_follower.desc: Frail but extremely fast swarmer. Dangerous in groups.
enemyInfo.summoner.label: Summoner
enemyInfo.summoner.desc: Hangs back and periodically summons reinforcements. Kill it first.
enemyInfo.shield_unit.label: Shield Unit
enemyInfo.shield_unit.desc: Heavy armoured tank with a barrier. Bleed immune. Can boost nearby allies.
enemyInfo.healer.label: Healer
enemyInfo.healer.desc: Restores HP to nearby enemies on a cooldown. Eliminate it before it undoes your damage.
enemyInfo.boss_spawner.label: Boss Spawner
enemyInfo.boss_spawner.desc: Immobile spawner that releases enemies on a timer. Destroy it before the countdown ends.
enemyInfo.bulk_golem.label: Bulk Golem
enemyInfo.bulk_golem.desc: Boss. Massive golem that splits into smaller golems at low HP. Ground-slam AOE attack.
enemyInfo.artificer_knave.label: Artificer Knave
enemyInfo.artificer_knave.desc: Boss. High-speed multi-phase fighter. Becomes more aggressive at each phase threshold.
enemyInfo.queen_cult.label: Queen Cult
enemyInfo.queen_cult.desc: Boss. Cult leader that summons followers and mages while striking with projectiles.
enemyInfo.antony_blemmye.label: Antony Blemmyae
enemyInfo.antony_blemmye.desc: Boss. Chest-faced bruiser. Up close he bites to drain HP or sweeps a wide slash; his hammer sends a shockwave forward and he charges a cold death ball at range.
enemyInfo.handsome_devil.label: Handsome Devil
enemyInfo.handsome_devil.desc: Floor 6 boss. Phase 1 raises red floor spikes and lava grids. Phase 2 fires red laser eyes.
enemyInfo.bowman_bane.label: Bowman's Bane
enemyInfo.bowman_bane.desc: Secret boss. Found by revisiting a cleared secret room. Drops lightning columns and sweeps a tracking beam. At half HP he unleashes Justice of Sonichu — a fan of room-spanning lightning bolts that strike across the arena.
enemyInfo.mirror_knight.label: Mirror Champion
enemyInfo.mirror_knight.desc: Elite. Copies the player's equipped moves and items. The perfect counter to your build.
enemyInfo.mooggy.label: Mooggy
enemyInfo.mooggy.desc: White and black assassin cat with a red aura. Mirrors your stats and items, then fires rapid bleed-stacking eye lasers.
enemyInfo.god.label: GOD
enemyInfo.god.desc: Final boss. Multi-phase deity with beam sweeps, nova blasts, and judgement strikes. Immune to all status effects.
moves.lightning_cross.name: Lightning Cross
moves.lightning_cross.desc: Call down two room-spanning lightning bolts through yourself, one horizontal and one vertical, damaging everything they cross and healing you 1% max HP per enemy struck. 2 charges.
moves.princess_shield.name: Princess's Shield
moves.princess_shield.desc: Raise a pink barrier worth 40% of your max HP. Auto-casts itself the moment your HP drops below 15%, as long as it is off cooldown.
moves.love_bomb_laser.name: Love Bomb
moves.love_bomb_laser.desc: Hold to charge, then release a heart-shaped bomb toward the cursor that bursts in a pink AOE. Enemies caught in the blast have a chance to be Sparkled (guaranteed crits for a few seconds).
